description: Run any open-source model (Llama, FLUX, SDXL, Whisper, etc.) via one API.

predict.notes: Async prediction creation. Pricing is model-dependent — MVP flat price, migrate to model-aware metering later.

status.notes: Polling is free. MVP routing assumes client passes :id in query as `id` — wrapper substitutes.

flux-schnell.notes: FLUX schnell — fast high-quality image gen ($0.003/img). Async: returns prediction id, client polls /v1/predictions/:id until status=succeeded.
